name: pnr-default
description: Full PnR pipeline: handoff gate → fp → place → cts → route → SPEF → report

tasks.content: [PNR HANDOFF] Verify input netlist + SDC + LEFs
tasks.detail:
Run scripts/preflight.py <ip> first.
Determine input netlist:
- [ ] If <ip>/dft/out/scan.v exists → use it (DFT-inserted)
- [ ] Else <ip>/syn/out/synth.v
- [ ] Else STOP with `[PNR HANDOFF MISSING] run /syn first`
Verify SDC: <ip>/sta/out/<ip>.sdc must exist (run /sta-sdc if not).
Verify bundled/source-tree PDK: $SKY130_TLEF, $SKY130_LEF, $SKY130_LIB, $SKY130_TRACKS, and $SKY130_RCX_RULES all readable.
Verify sky130 IO layer directions: horizontal=met3, vertical=met2 unless SSOT intentionally overrides to matching layer directions.
Gate: input + SDC + tech + physical constraints all present.

Run scripts/run_fp.py <ip>. Reads SSOT pnr: section for utilization_pct, aspect_ratio, core_space_um, io_layers. Writes <ip>/pnr/tcl/floorplan.tcl + executes openroad.
DFT-aware: scan_en tied low via set_case_analysis.
Gate: floorplan.def non-empty, design area > 0.

Run scripts/run_place.py <ip>. Pipeline: global_placement (density target from SSOT) → detailed_placement → check_placement.
If check_placement reports overlaps: STOP with `[PNR PLACE OVERLAPS]` — usually utilization too high.
Gate: placed.def non-empty, density.json written.

Run scripts/run_cts.py <ip>. Pipeline: clock_tree_synthesis with SSOT cts_buf_list → detailed_placement → write_def + write_verilog.
cts.v has CTS buffers inserted on the clock; this is the netlist /pnr-route consumes.
Gate: cts.def + cts.v non-empty, clock_skew reported.

Run scripts/run_route.py <ip>. Pipeline: global_route → detailed_route → extract_parasitics → write_spef.
DRC count and first 10 violations recorded in drc.json. Do NOT auto-fix DRC — surface and stop.
If SPEF write fails (0 bytes): STOP with `[PNR SPEF FAILED]` — sign-off STA blocked.
Gate: routed.spef non-empty.

Run scripts/write_report.py <ip>. Aggregates artifact presence + density + DRC count + handoff status.
Gate: pnr.report.md written.

Print one summary line:
`[PNR HANDOFF] <ip>/pnr/out/routed.spef ready (drc=N) — run /sta-post`.
Gate: handoff line emitted.
